## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (type check + Node tests)
- [ ] `npm run test:browser` passes (if behavior affects rendering/bridging)
- [ ] Independent-implementation boundary respected (no copied code, no internal artifacts — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Security-affecting changes include regression tests and fixtures
- [ ] Docs (`README.md`, `THREAT_MODEL.md`, `docs/SECURITY_MODEL.md`) updated and consistent with actual behavior
- [ ] No security claim describes a protection the code does not provide
